default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the DataGrid account reset and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Account Reset:** DataGrid is resetting strategy to focus on measurable outcomes, not content volume, after a high-spend, low-ROI period.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The new strategy prioritizes quality over quantity, using custom accounts as an R\&D lab to build scalable playbooks.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** A new "custom account" process gives DataGrid priority access to internal engineering, unblocking previous web dev bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Immediate Actions:** Nathan will create the "Guide" pipeline ticket and begin keyword research; Liz will get PSEO template examples from Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid Account Reset & New Strategy

  - [**Problem:** High spend yielded low ROI, with organic traffic growth lagging expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Context:** A November website migration caused a major traffic dip (404s, broken links, missing meta tags) that required significant recovery work.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** A "move fast and break things" approach created a blog with high content volume but poor structure and significant cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Solution:** A strategic reset to focus on quality and measurable outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**New Mandate:** Treat DataGrid as a priority account, acting as a strategic partner to build a scalable organic growth machine.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** The "custom account" process provides priority access to internal engineering, eliminating the web dev bottlenecks that previously forced a blog-only content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Content & SEO Strategy

  - [**Content Focus:** Shift from volume to quality.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Output Mix:** 80% net new content, 20% refreshing high-performing legacy posts.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevent cannibalization and leverage existing authority.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [**Taxonomy:** The final URL structure is `/agents/[agent-name]`, `/agents/for/[use-case]`, and `/guides/[guide-name]`.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This structure is simpler and avoids the complexity of a separate `/category/` structure.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**Author Authority:** Use real authors with LinkedIn profiles to build E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Signals credibility to Google and improves content ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:** The goal is to be the recommended tool in AI-generated SERP features.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2428.0)
      - [**Challenge:** This requires creating content that LLMs value (e.g., statistical listicles) while also driving direct conversions—a problem no one has fully solved.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

### Pipeline & Production Plan

  - [**Production Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [**Sucheta:** Starts "Connector" content next week.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [**PSEO:** Blocked pending template examples from Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [**Pipeline Creation Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
    1.  [Nathan creates a ticket defining the pipeline criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
    2.  [The team builds the pipeline in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
    3.  [Nathan reviews and provides feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathan:**](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
      - [Create the "Guide" pipeline ticket in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
      - [Begin keyword research for TOFU and PSEO topics.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Liz:**](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
      - [Get PSEO template examples from Talal.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
      - [Clarify the new URL taxonomy with the prototype developer.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [**Sucheta:**](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
      - [Begin "Connector" content production next week.](https://fathom.video/share/injsR3ehZ5LHAbCXUrDeLzC7H_bmXCm5?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)

action_items.description: Add refresh high-performing DataGrid blogs to weekly output (20%)
Create Atlas ticket for Guides pipeline; then stand up 2 agents mid next week
Add keywords to Tofu/PSCO content map; cross-map w/ Talal's sheet
Ask Talal re: Agents/for routing in prototype; confirm PSEO sequencing
